# Tourmaline

> Analyse Teal.fm scrobble history and discover your listener personality.

Tourmaline is a free, open-source scrobble analyser for Teal.fm (fm.teal.alpha.feed.play records on ATProto). It fetches scrobbles from a user's PDS, computes a listening profile, enriches artist data via MusicBrainz and Last.fm, and assigns a listener personality archetype. No sign-in is required to view a profile; OAuth is only used to share the personality card to Bluesky.

## What's analysed

- Top artists, tracks, and albums
- Genre profile (MusicBrainz + Last.fm tags)
- Mood mapping (energetic, melancholic, etc.)
- Listening timeline (365-day heatmap)
- Era preference (decade distribution)
- Diversity score (0–100)
- Obscurity index (0–100)
- Listener personality archetype

## Pages

- /: Home — enter an ATProto handle or DID to start analysis
- /profile/[did]: Full listening profile for a given DID
- /share: Share personality card to Bluesky (requires OAuth)
- /about: Privacy details, how it works, what's analysed, licence, and credits

## How it works

1. Handle or DID is resolved to a PDS URL via Slingshot.
2. fm.teal.alpha.feed.play records are fetched page-by-page from the PDS.
3. Scrobbles are aggregated server-side into top artists/tracks/albums, genre profiles, mood mapping, era preference, diversity, and obscurity.
4. Top artists are enriched with genre data (MusicBrainz), listener counts and images (Last.fm), and image fallback (Deezer).

## Privacy

Analysis runs server-side. Scrobbles are held in an in-memory session (10-minute inactivity timeout, never written to disk). No persistent database. No tracking, no fingerprinting. Reading scrobbles is unauthenticated.

## External services used

Slingshot (identity resolution), user PDS (scrobble records), MusicBrainz (genre/tags), Last.fm (listener counts and images), Deezer (image fallback), Bluesky CDN (avatar).

## Licence

AGPL-3.0-only
